etymology.text:
Etymology tree
Proto-Indo-European *bʰeh₂g-der.
Proto-Indo-Iranian *bʰagás
Proto-Iranian *bagáh
Proto-Indo-European *dʰeh₁-
Proto-Indo-European *-tós
Proto-Indo-European *dʰh₁tós
Proto-Indo-Iranian *dʰHtás
Proto-Iranian *daHtáh
Proto-Iranian *BágadaHtah
Old Persian *Bagadātah
Middle Persian 𐭡𐭢𐭣𐭲 (bgdt /⁠bag-dād⁠/)
Classical Persian بَغْدَاد (baġdād)bor.
Arabic بغداد
Borrowed from Classical Persian بَغْدَاد (baġdād), from Middle Persian 𐭡𐭢𐭣𐭲 (bgdt /⁠bag-dād⁠/), from Old Persian *Bagadātah, from Proto-Iranian *BágadaHtah, from *bagáh + *daHtáh.
